title: ExAqua
description: This mod is inspired by ExNihilo, but insted of sieving gravel, you sieve fluids. This mod also adds cauldrons that use fluids and items as crafting ingridients and Squeezer that you can jump on to mesh items into liquids.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087c7354f447d91b2cda32f179973a18fd212921.png)
This mod is inspired by ExNihilo, but insted of sieving gravel, you sieve fluids. This mod also adds cauldrons that use fluids and items as crafting ingridients and Squeezer that you can jump on to mesh items into liquids. 

This mod is made for modpacks. Automatics sieves are uselles without source of electricity. 
I also recomend changing or adding more recipies.

This mod adds 4 new types of crafting recipies. You can read their documentation [here.](https://github.com/rutaji/ExAqua-mod-repository/blob/1.16.5-0.4/doc/Recipies_documentation.md)
